reference: Take two tablets of Simhanada Guggulu twice daily, one capsule of Orthowin three times daily, and one capsule of Shallaki once daily. It is an Ayurvedic medicine; you will get good results without any side effects.
text: Take 2 tablets of Siminata gugulu twice daily, 1 capsule of Orthwyn 3 times daily, and 1 capsule of Shalateem once daily. It is an Ayurvedic medicine; you will get good results without any side effects.
